task: Is there a documented acknowledgment from the borrower confirming that they have understood the contents of the KFS?
How is this acknowledgment obtained and stored for future reference?
Does the KFS include a computation of the Annual Percentage Rate (APR) for all loans?
Are all fees, including third-party charges (e.g., insurance, legal fees), disclosed as part of the APR?
Is a detailed amortization schedule provided with the KFS, showing the breakdown of principal and interest payments over the loan tenure?
Is a validity period clearly defined in the KFS for loans with a tenor of seven days or more (minimum three working days) and for loans with a tenor of less than seven days (minimum one working day)?
Is the cooperative bank bound by the terms mentioned in the KFS if the borrower agrees to them within the validity period?
Are all fees and charges mentioned in the KFS? Is there a process in place to ensure that no unmentioned fees are charged to the borrower during the loan period without their explicit consent?
Are penalties for delayed payments, foreclosure charges, or any other contingent charges clearly disclosed in the KFS?
Are third-party charges (e.g., insurance, legal fees) disclosed separately in the KFS?
Are receipts and related documents for third-party charges provided to the borrower within a reasonable time?
For digital loans, is there a documented cooling-off period during which borrowers can exit the loan without penalty?
Is the cooling-off period in line with the board-approved policy, and does it comply with the minimum cooling-off period of one day?
Is the KFS included as a summary box in the loan agreement?
Does the loan agreement explicitly detail the borrower’s engagement with recovery agents, if any?
Does the KFS include the contact details of the nodal grievance redressal officer, including phone number and email?
How is the grievance redressal process communicated to borrowers, and is it in compliance with RBI guidelines?
Has the bank implemented the necessary systems and processes to comply with the KFS guidelines as required by the RBI?
Are all new retail and MSME loans sanctioned on or after October 1, 2024, fully compliant with the KFS guidelines?
Are the bank staff properly trained and aware of the RBI guidelines on KFS?
Is there a process in place to ensure that staff explain the KFS to borrowers during the loan application process?
How is the validity period of the KFS tracked? Is there a system in place to ensure the loan terms provided in the KFS remain valid for the specified time frame?
Are there measures in place to ensure that the borrower’s personal information and loan details in the KFS are securely stored and protected?
